{# templates/registry.rs.txt — GEN crate only (e.g. hauliage_fleet_gen/src/registry.rs) #}
// ⚠️ WARNING: This file is auto-generated by BRRTRouter for the **gen** crate
// ⚠️ DO NOT MODIFY - Changes will be overwritten on next `brrtrouter-gen generate`
// ⚠️ To change API shape, edit the OpenAPI spec and regenerate the gen crate
// ⚠️ Mock/example controllers live in gen/src/controllers/ — they are NOT business logic
//
// ADR 0001 Layer 1: `register_from_spec` wires **gen mock controllers** for every route.
// Real implementations live in the sibling **impl** crate; see `impl_registry.rs.txt` →
// `<service>_impl/src/impl_registry.rs` (`register_impl`), which overrides selected routes.

use brrtrouter::dispatcher::Dispatcher;
use brrtrouter::spec::RouteMeta;
use brrtrouter::typed::spawn_typed_with_stack_size_and_name;

/// Register all gen handlers statically (legacy; prefer `register_from_spec`).
///
/// # Safety
/// Spawns handler coroutines. Callers must ensure coroutine runtime is set up.
#[allow(dead_code)]
pub unsafe fn register_all(dispatcher: &mut Dispatcher) {
    {% for entry in entries -%}
    {% if entry.is_proxy %}
    dispatcher.handlers.insert(
        "{{ entry.name }}".to_string(),
        brrtrouter::dispatcher::spawn_untyped_with_stack_size_and_name(
            crate::controllers::{{ entry.name }}::handle,
            {{ entry.stack_size_bytes }},
            Some("{{ entry.name }}"),
        )
        .expect("failed to spawn untyped proxy handler coroutine")
    );
    {% else %}
    dispatcher.register_typed_with_stack_size(
        "{{ entry.name }}",
        crate::controllers::{{ entry.name }}::{{ entry.controller_struct }},
        {{ entry.stack_size_bytes }},
    );
    {% endif %}
    {% endfor %}
}

/// Register gen mock/proxy controllers for routes from the OpenAPI spec (ADR 0001 Layer 1).
///
/// Clears existing handler registrations before wiring routes. In a gen+impl service,
/// call this first, then `<service>_impl::impl_registry::register_impl` to override
/// selected handlers with real business logic.
///
/// # Safety
/// Spawns handler coroutines. Callers must ensure coroutine runtime is set up.
pub unsafe fn register_from_spec(dispatcher: &mut Dispatcher, routes: &[RouteMeta]) {
    dispatcher.handlers.clear();
    dispatcher.worker_pools.clear();

    for route in routes {
        match route.handler_name.as_ref() {
            {% for entry in entries -%}
            "{{ entry.name }}" => {
                {% if entry.is_proxy %}
                let tx = brrtrouter::dispatcher::spawn_untyped_with_stack_size_and_name(
                    crate::controllers::{{ entry.name }}::handle,
                    {{ entry.stack_size_bytes }},
                    Some(route.handler_name.as_ref()),
                )
                .expect("failed to spawn untyped proxy handler coroutine");
                dispatcher.add_route(route.clone(), tx);
                {% else %}
                let tx = spawn_typed_with_stack_size_and_name(
                    crate::controllers::{{ entry.name }}::{{ entry.controller_struct }},
                    {{ entry.stack_size_bytes }},
                    Some(route.handler_name.as_ref()),
                );
                dispatcher.add_route(route.clone(), tx);
                {% endif %}
            }
            {% endfor %}
            _ => {}
        }
    }
}
